feedback.text: To immerse the first steps in the economic simulators, I bought “SIMCITY 2013”. I remember the problems with servers and connection instability. A mostly one-person game requires a continuous internet connection. If ‘Origin’ is no longer operational in the long future, access to games paid for and connected to a user account can be lost. This problem is not unique to ‘Origin’. ‘STEAM’, ‘Ubisoft Connect’, ‘Epic Games Store’ and other ‘launchers’, on which it depends whether the game can be launched, are also threatened. Several games have already been hit in this way and without special “circumvention” they cannot even be activated because the DRM verification system, which was still online, is no longer operational (e.g.: Games for Windows Live). Computer games are also part of culture and should also be protected as other works of art. I have played for young years and I would like to share this moment with my future family as well.
